title: (4 Pack) 8oz.Outdoor Camping Chrome Stainless Steel Pocket Hip Flask
description:
Now you can take your favorite beverage in this classy flask anywhere you want to go. Fits well in your pocket and doesn't leak. Holding 8oz of your drink of choice, the flask is brushed with a stainless steel finish and is attached with a screw down cap.
